{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Ka’nie’ka
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[City of Light (novel)|City of Light]]
}}

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Ka’nie’ka]] was the former name of the [[Eldest]] [[Nye]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6">''City of Light'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Ka’nie’ka]] wants to restore [[Valinhall]]'s power.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|“Ka’nie’ka is selfish and afraid. He—” ... “That was the Eldest Nye’s name once, before his title.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
